title: Broken master CI
body: @mtrmac #24 broke master CI, we should look into it

comments.body:
https://travis-ci.org/projectatomic/skopeo/builds/118111300 apparently failed because of

```
Broadcast message from root@testing-gce-62837a88-d47b-4070-8588-9fddab31a890

    (unknown) at 23:04 ...

The system is going down for power off NOW!
```

Is there a way to rerun the test in Travis?
not sure, I'm about to merge and we'll see if it's fixed
